passives.name: Death
passives.effects: If you deal {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} damage that would leave a champion below {{as|5% of their '''maximum''' health}}, {{tip|execute}} them.

passives.name: Taxes
passives.effects: Killing a champion grants you an additional {{g|25}}.

effects_structured.raw: If post-mitigation damage would leave a champion below 5% max health, execute them.
Killing a champion grants an additional 25 gold.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Death only evaluates post-mitigation damage outcomes against enemy champions and executes at the 5% max-health threshold.
Player-visible behavior: Taxes grants the 25 bonus gold only on champion kill events and does not trigger on assists or non-champion takedowns.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (The Collector)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of post-mitigation execute threshold semantics and Taxes champion-kill bonus-gold behavior
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
